payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a glass front showing a dark, unlit interior and a single soot-stained log or ceramic log; glass is slightly reflective and the metal frame shows minor wear and ash residue, visible from roughly 1.5 meters away.

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"black metal fireplace insert","long_description":"Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a glass front showing a dark, unlit interior and a single soot-stained log or ceramic log; glass is slightly reflective and the metal frame shows minor wear and ash residue, visible from roughly 1.5 meters away.","attributes":["black metal frame","rectangular glass door","dark unlit interior","soot-stained log (ceramic or wood)","reflective glass","ash residue","minor surface wear","built-in insert style"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
